notes: GP DocStudio 2.5 - New 'Excel: Preview & Fix' tool: open a statement, see it with the column lines drawn on it, drag to fix columns, name the columns, crop the repeating header/footer, box out anything unwanted, and a live badge tells you the running balance ties before you save. PDF to Excel now handles wrapped narration and multi-page statements correctly (Canara/HDFC/ICICI balance-verified). Also: HDFC deposit/withdrawal split, and the updater now closes the app for you (no more 'close the app' prompt).
